top_signals.title: Oil Rebounds as US Launches New Strikes on Iran
top_signals.summary: Oil rebounded as fresh US military strikes in Iran clouded the outlook for an interim deal between Tehran and Washington to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Stephen Stapczynski reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
